title: Post 3I Earth geography
wikitext:
[]: Post 3I Earth geography             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 03, 2013 7:42 pm So anyone want to play GUESS THE GEOGRAPHIC FEATURE game? Operation US has the Earth in the background pretty much all the time. Unfortunately most of the time the clouds get in the way of seeing any recognizible terrain. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Sep 03, 2013 8:04 pm I'm tempted to say it's Mexico, but that's only because that's what's most recognizable to me living in the Western hemisphere. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 03, 2013 8:09 pm Yeah should probabaly mention that the orientation of the image is unlikely be UP = NORTH.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Sep 03, 2013 9:25 pm I'm going to go out on a limb and say it's.....Canada......Just a guess

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Sep 03, 2013 11:38 pm I'd say your best bet is finding mountain ranges near coastlines, then searching for those islands. However, I think they probably factored in the rising sea levels from all of Antarctica melting while making this map, so you'd probably be searching in vain.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 04, 2013 1:27 am My first guess would be the Adriatic or thereabouts in the eastern Med.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Sep 04, 2013 3:04 am riffraff11235 wrote: However, I think they probably factored in the rising sea levels from all of Antarctica melting while making this map, so you'd probably be searching in vain.

[]:             Quote Post by Ah Q » Wed Sep 04, 2013 7:48 pm I feel like there must be a some high-tech way of figuring this out. Something easier than comparing the 3.0 screenshots with actual maps. But then, I am a lawyer, so I clearly do not know what the hell I'm talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Wed Sep 04, 2013 11:17 pm This thread got me thinking about the shot of poor Eva-04 in 2.0, so I searched and found a thread that's a little similar to this one, albeit this was all before 3I: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12187/Nerv-and-Eva04-canadian-or-us-/0/? So, I'd imagine that the piece of land that's seen during Operation US must exist somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Sep 05, 2013 3:04 am ^ So Rebuild!EVA-04 was situated in the Canada-US frontier, probably on the Canada side, I learned something new! Back on topic, isn't there softwares that found a geographic location from an image or a sketch of landscape somewhere in the vast ocean that is Internet? That would be of great help!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Sep 07, 2013 10:31 am Just realized posting on another thread that there seems to be a fairly well-defined satellite image that's facing Earth behind Mari in the opening space scene in Q. SPOILER: Show
